fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From newsapi.org → Get API Key (free tier: 100 requests/day)

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key by fetching news sources

metadata.summary: News API for fetching headlines, articles, and sources from 80,000+ news outlets worldwide.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to newsapi.org and sign up
2. Copy your API key from the dashboard
3. Paste it here
